message:
fix: replace placeholder podcast links with real Apple and Spotify URLs

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/kzbj14ru1gcm39o1z8sedfw4

files.patch:
@@ -8,9 +8,8 @@ interface Props {
 
 const { rssUrl = '/rss.xml', size = 'md', iconOnly = false, centered = false } = Astro.props
 
-// Placeholder links - replace with actual URLs
-const appleUrl = '#apple-podcasts'
-const spotifyUrl = '#spotify'
+const appleUrl = 'https://podcasts.apple.com/podcast/id1874135065'
+const spotifyUrl = 'https://open.spotify.com/show/26diksZSL5cTh9cJ9zbgvz'
 
 const btnClass = iconOnly
   ? 'inline-flex items-center justify-center w-9 h-9 rounded-full'
